name: 子归 - Blossom
short_description: Early spring, 1999, Taoyuan Village. In just several days, a series of drowning incidents occurred in the same quaint village. Then, on the night of the fifteenth day, numerous villagers witnessed a woman in red who bore an uncanny resemblance to a lady who had previously met an unjust demise...
detailed_description:
"Blossom" is an immersive case-solving game.

Early spring, 1999, Taoyuan Village.
In just several days, a series of drowning incidents occurred in the same quaint village. Then, on the night of the fifteenth day, numerous villagers witnessed a woman in red who bore an uncanny resemblance to a lady who had previously met an unjust demise...



  • As a junior student at Qilin Normal University, you and your classmate, Wang Yishan, will venture to his hometown, Taoyuan Village, to work as volunteer teachers.
  • However, unbeknownst to you both, beneath the apparent tranquility, a storm that has been brewing for two decades is on the verge of erupting.



  • Each villager is guarding their secrets.
  • Pay close attention to their words and actions, delve deep into their pasts, and untangle their intricate web of deceit.



  • Every action has consequences, and every seemingly coincidental occurrence bears great significance.
  • Collect and analyze all the clues to uncover the truth beneath the surface.



  • Relentlessly pursue the truth and eventually expose the true culprit.
  • However, you must also question whether the "truth" you uncover is indeed the whole truth.
